creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
The dhclient-lease(8) referenced  in dhclient.conf(5) does not
	exist. dhclient.conf is referenced  as dhclient.conf(8) in the
	dhclient(8), while it lives in the section 5.

Fix: I'm not  sure if  dhclient.leases(5) is what  is meant  by the
	dhclient-lease(8), but the dhclient.8 is easily corrected by:
How-To-Repeat: 
	RTFM-pages :-)
